ad_copy.headline: Glow Starts Here
ad_copy.body_copy: Hydrate. Refresh. Radiant skin, effortlessly. AquaGlow Misting Face Cream: Your daily boost of moisture.

variations.label: Variation A - Primary
variations.headline: Glow Starts Here
variations.body_copy: Hydrate. Refresh. Radiant skin, effortlessly. AquaGlow Misting Face Cream: Your daily boost of moisture.

variations.label: Variation B - Emotional
variations.headline: Feel the Glow
variations.body_copy: Soft Silk. Big Results. Unveil Your Natural Radiance.

variations.label: Variation C - Direct
variations.headline: Hydrate Now
variations.body_copy: Instant refresher. 24-hour moisture surge. First-time free sample.

visual_direction.layout_description: Bold central image of a person spraying AquaGlow onto their face, with soft water droplets in dynamic motion. Clean background emphasizing product and action.
visual_direction.composition: Face front-center, AquaGlow bottle slightly behind, water droplets mid-air. Minimal negative space to draw focus.
visual_direction.color_usage: Primary brand blue in typography and CTA button. Soft whites and aqua gradients in gradients.
visual_direction.typography_usage: Headline: 72pt primary font bold. Subheadline: 24pt secondary font. Body: 14pt clean sans-serif. CTA: Match headline weight.
visual_direction.imagery_style: Photorealistic with soft golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field.

image_generation_prompt.stable_diffusion: Photorealistic face mist spray on hydrated skin, dynamic water droplets mid-atomization, soft golden-hour lighting, minimalist white background, 4K resolution, subtle product glow --v 5.2
image_generation_prompt.midjourney: photorealistic face mist spray on skin, liquid emotion theme, soft focus, water droplets, minimalist background, ultra-detailed --ar 1:1 --v 6
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: crowded background, harsh shadows, text overlays, low contrast, dull colors

layout_spec.spacing_notes: 10px margins, 5px spacing between text blocks, safe zone: 5% from edges

brand_compliance_notes: Uses brand colors (primary blue/white), professional typography hierarchy, aspirational yet trustworthy visual tone aligned with brand guidelines.
ab_testing_tips: Test headline warmth ('Feel the Glow' vs 'Hydrate Now') vs. direct CTAs ('Buy Now' vs 'Claim Freebie'). Compare emotional vs. functional body copy variants across demographics.
